_README: Affiliate program registry — the monetization last-mile.
monitor_agent detects which tools leak revenue (clicks, no tracked link).
This file tells the system HOW to close each leak, so the only human step
left is the irreducible one: sign up for the program.
ready       -> signup_url known; apply, then paste affiliate_id OR affiliate_url here.
needs_check -> program likely exists; verify signup_url + network first (signup_search helps).
no_program  -> no affiliate program exists (e.g. OpenAI). monitor_agent stops flagging it.
self        -> monetize via your OWN offer (no external approval); route CTA through /api/out.
How one human action monetizes a tool (and stays automatic):
1. Apply to the program (use signup_url / signup_search).
2a. Templated network -> put your affiliate_id below (username/code). System builds the link.
2b. Opaque network (Impact/PartnerStack) -> paste your full tracked link into affiliate_url.
3. affiliate_autofill.py writes tools.affiliate_url; monitor_agent auto-resolves the flag.
Newly discovered tools on a registered program get monetized automatically on the next run.
NEVER invent an affiliate_id/affiliate_url. Only real values you obtained by signing up.
signup_url values left null are unverified on purpose — use signup_search to find the real page.

impact.note: Impact.com links are per-creative and opaque. Paste the full tracked link into affiliate_url.

partnerstack.note: PartnerStack links are opaque. Paste the full tracked link into affiliate_url.

cj.note: CJ Affiliate links are opaque. Paste the full tracked link into affiliate_url.

shareasale.note: ShareASale links are opaque. Paste the full tracked link into affiliate_url.

elevenlabs.name: ElevenLabs
elevenlabs.notes: Audio, highest single leak. Verify program + network before applying.

canva.name: Canva
canva.notes: Canva runs a well-known affiliate program (Impact). Opaque link -> paste full URL into affiliate_url.

notion-ai.name: Notion
notion-ai.notes: Notion affiliate runs via PartnerStack. Opaque link -> paste full URL into affiliate_url.

manychat.name: ManyChat
manychat.notes: Marketing, high EPC. Partner program likely via PartnerStack.

writesonic.name: Writesonic
writesonic.notes: Writing, EPC ~1.0. Many writing SaaS use FirstPromoter (?fpr=) or Tolt (?via=) — confirm.

dall-e-3.name: DALL-E 3
dall-e-3.notes: OpenAI has no affiliate program. Suppress monetization flag; revenue here must come from comparison/alternative pages routing to monetizable tools.

chatgpt.name: ChatGPT
chatgpt.notes: OpenAI — no affiliate program. Suppress flag. See strategic opportunity zh-chatgpt-access for the real money here.

perplexity-ai.name: Perplexity AI
perplexity-ai.notes: No public affiliate program as of 2026-01. Suppress flag; revisit if one launches.

craiyon.name: Craiyon
craiyon.notes: Free tool, ad-supported, no affiliate program. Suppress flag.

strategic_opportunities.title: 中文 ChatGPT 接入需求 — 站内最大单一搜索需求
strategic_opportunities.evidence: GSC: 'chatgpt 充值/产品/怎么用' 查询簇约 900 impressions/月，远超任何单个工具页需求。
strategic_opportunities.play: 把 /access 和 ZH answer 页的主 CTA 经 /api/out 指向你自有变现出口（Skool 社群 / 自有代充·订阅服务 / 已有联盟）。这是无需外部审核、今天即可上线的最高 ROI 动作；外部 affiliate 申请在 PV 起量前都是次要项。
